'''Lucian Hejaran''' was a prominent member of the influential and wealthy [[Hejaran family]] of [[House Mecetti]].

==Biography==
His family owned the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Pella]] known as [[Nightsinger's Orb]] and he lived at the [[Hejaran Castle]] until his death at the hands of his cousin [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] [[Brigta Hejaran]]. Lucian had learned that Brigta had been corrupted by the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] and was under the influence of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] regime. Brigta ended up killing Lucian in order to protect her secret.

==Appearances==
